name: Adventure Time
description: This is the largest community for fans of Adventure Time! With over 15,000 members, you're sure to find a perfect balance of active, fun, and serious conversations!

name: She-Ra: Princesses Of Power
description:
In this reboot of the 1980s original, a magic sword transforms a loyal solider into legendary hero She-Ra, who unites a rebellion to fight against the very group she was once part of, including her best friend.
We are the Discord Partnered She-Ra server, a hub for all things She-Ra, through discussion, events, and gay appreciation. We have an active community with multiple general channels, tons of fan art and a perfect balance of fun, fire and chaos with serious topic discussions.

name: The Owl House
description: Luz is a self-assured teenage human girl who accidentally stumbles upon a portal to the Demon Realm. There she befriends the rebellious witch Eda and an adorably tiny warrior named King. Despite not having magical abilities, Luz pursues her dream of becoming a witch by serving as Eda’s apprentice at the Owl House and ultimately finds a new family in an unlikely setting.

name: Avatar Wiki
description: The Avatar Wiki Discord server is a place for users to come together to socialize and discuss their love of the franchise. Everyone is welcome, whether you are a user of the wiki, a reader, or just a fan looking for other people to talk to.

name: The Garden Gate
description:
Pai Sho is a formerly-fictional strategy board game portrayed in Avatar: The Last Airbender. Through the years, people have created real sets of rules inspired by the show to bring the game to life.
The Garden Gate is a place for everything Pai Sho! Here you can learn how to play a variety of Pai Sho games, share and discuss matches with other members online, participate in community-hosted tournaments and events, and even get help making/buying your very own Pai Sho set!

name: The Ghost and Molly McGee
description: Follow Molly McGee, an optimistic tween, who lives to make the world a better place, and a grumpy ghost named Scratch, whose joy comes from spreading misery. When one of Scratch’s spells backfires, he finds himself forever cursed in Molly's presence.

name: MegaCraft
description:
We are a Minecraft server (Java and Bedrock Compatible) that brings bending and the Avatarverse to Minecraft! Here are just a sampling of our exciting features:
• Bend the four elements in Minecraft, with hundreds of abilities to choose from
• Monthly bending tournaments, where you can compete for custom titles
• Exciting, interactive events with Avatarverse character meet-and-greets, free item giveaways, friendly competitions and more
• A vibrant, inclusive community that welcomes all players
• Different gamemodes - peaceful survival with no griefing, chaotic factions with raiding, free for all arenas (based on ATLA locations), and more!
• An active discord server full of resources and helpful players

name: Gachiakuta
description:
Wrongfully cast into a monstrous abyss of garbage, a young boy uses a transforming weapon made from trash to fight for survival and seek revenge against the upper class.
We are an unofficial English Discord community dedicated to Gachiakuta, a trash-punk, dark fantasy, ongoing battle shonen created by Kei Urana and Andou Hideyoshi. We regularly host giveaways & events (sometimes with prizes), have various bots & channels and are social & non-toxic.
You're welcome to join regardless of how far you're in the manga or anime or if Gachiakuta is currently just in your watchlist!

name: My Hero Academia
description:
We are the largest My Hero Academia community in the world! Our goal is to bring together fans from all over to hangout, game, and enjoy the series together.
➭ MHA News (Anime/Manga/Merch/ETC)
➭ Art District (Digital/Photography/Writing/ETC)
➭ An array of emotes + additional servers
➭ A lovely and welcoming community!

name: Gokurakugai
description:
Gokurakugai, a bright and bustling working class district with a hidden dark side. In this lawless area, Tao and Alma take on jobs as troubleshooters for hire.

Their tasks range from helping a young boy find his missing friend to investigating mysterious disappearances and unsettling cases of disfigured animal corpses. Meanwhile, sinister spirits lurking in the shadows reveal a whole different side to these troubleshooters!

name: Kpop Demon Hunters
description:
We are the official partner community on both Reddit and the Fandom Wiki for Kpop Demon Hunters, the animated film produced by Sony Entertainment. The movie was written by Danya Jimenez and Hannah McMechan, with Chris Appelhans and Maggie Kang serving as directors.

Synopsis:
When they aren't selling out stadiums, K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey use their secret identities as badass demon hunters to protect their fans from an ever-present supernatural threat. Together, they must face their biggest enemy yet - an irresistible rival boy band of demons in disguise!
